x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Service catalog items represent fulfillment workflows that AI Agents can automate end-to-end. A healthy catalog volume maximizes the impact of Now Assist for Creator in generating and optimizing catalog items and fulfillment flows.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Ensure service catalog items are managed in ServiceNow to unlock AI generation capabilities.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_de03e33acfd903108935fb251d851c91
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Service catalog items represent fulfillment workflows that AI Agents can automate end-to-end. A healthy catalog volume maximizes the impact of Now Assist for Creator in generating and optimizing catalog items and fulfillment flows.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Service Catalog Items Volume</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("sc_cat_item");
ga.addQuery("sys_class_name","!=","sc_cat_item_producer");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=50)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" items",finding:c+" catalog items found."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" items",finding:c+" catalog items found."};
return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"0 items",finding:"No catalog items found."};
})()]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>CREATOR</module>
<number>CHK0006191</number>
<order/>
<remediation_guidance>Ensure service catalog items are managed in ServiceNow to unlock AI generation capabilities.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>de03e33acfd903108935fb251d851c91</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
